title: Phase 2 Deployment Playbook: Gradient Compression
pre_deployment_checklist: ☐ Set up Prometheus + Grafana compression dashboard
☐ Brief operations team on feature flags

day_1_2: 3. Add feature flags for compression control
day_3_4: 7. Benchmark: measure compression ratio, latency, throughput
day_5: 9. Code review and merge to develop branch

day_1: 1. Route 10% of 100K nodes to compression (node-agent-1 only)
3. Monitor for 24 hours: loss curves, latency, throughput
day_2_3: 5. Validate no divergence in loss curves
day_4_5: 8. If issues: debug and adjust (sparsity, quantization)

week_3_gradual_rollout.day_1: Roll out to 25% of nodes (node-agent-1 + partial node-agent-2)
week_3_gradual_rollout.day_2: Roll out to 50% of nodes (node-agent-1 + node-agent-2)
week_3_gradual_rollout.day_3: Roll out to 75% of nodes (all + partial node-agent-3)
week_3_gradual_rollout.day_4_5: Roll out to 100% of nodes (all three node-agents)

ongoing: Auto-tune sparsity if converge rate drops
